title: selaginella martensii f. albolineata
intro: Selaginella martensii f. albolineata, also known as White Variegated Polypody, is a type of species of flowering plant in the Selaginellaceae family. It is a traditional medicinal plant used in various cultures, particularly in Asia, where it is valued for its adaptogenic properties, which help the body to resist stress and promote overall well-being. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce fatigue, improve cognitive function, and boost the immune system. In herbal medicine, Selaginella martensii f. albolineata is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is traditionally used to promote relaxation, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve sleep quality.
